image-compressor.title: Image Compressor
image-compressor.description: Compress JPEG, PNG, WebP images up to 80% without losing quality.
image-compressor.metaTitle: Free Image Compressor - Reduce Image Size Online | ToolPic
image-compressor.metaDescription: Compress JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF images online for free. Reduce file size up to 80% with smart compression. No upload, 100% browser-based.
image-compressor.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to select JPEG, PNG, or WebP images.
image-compressor.step2Desc: Use the quality slider to balance between file size and image quality.
image-compressor.step3Desc: Download compressed images individually or all at once.
image-compressor.feature1Desc: Advanced algorithms reduce file size up to 80% while maintaining visual quality.
image-compressor.feature2Desc: Compress multiple images at once. No file count limits.
image-compressor.feature3Desc: All processing happens in your browser. Your images never leave your device.
image-compressor.feature4Desc: Works with JPEG, PNG, WebP, and other common image formats.
image-compressor.faq1Q: Does compressing an image reduce its quality?
image-compressor.faq1A: Smart compression removes unnecessary data while preserving visual quality. At 80% quality, most images look identical to the original but are significantly smaller.
image-compressor.faq2Q: Is there a file size limit?
image-compressor.faq2A: You can upload images up to 50MB each. There is no limit on the number of images you can compress.
image-compressor.faq3Q: Are my images uploaded to a server?
image-compressor.faq3A: No. All compression happens locally in your browser using WebAssembly technology. Your images never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy.

image-converter.title: Image Converter
image-converter.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, BMP formats instantly.
image-converter.metaTitle: Free Image Converter - JPG PNG WebP AVIF Online | ToolPic
image-converter.metaDescription: Convert images between JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, BMP, TIFF formats online for free. Fast and secure.
image-converter.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select any JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, or BMP image.
image-converter.step2Desc: Select the target format you want to convert to from the dropdown menu.
image-converter.step3Desc: Click download to save your image in the new format instantly.
image-converter.feature1Desc: Convert between JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, BMP, and TIFF formats with a single click.
image-converter.feature2Desc: Convert multiple images at once. Save time with bulk format conversion.
image-converter.feature3Desc: Converts images while maintaining the highest possible quality in the target format.
image-converter.feature4Desc: Browser-based conversion means no waiting for uploads or downloads from a server.
image-converter.faq1Q: Which image formats can I convert between?
image-converter.faq1A: You can convert between JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, BMP, and TIFF formats. All conversions happen instantly in your browser.
image-converter.faq2Q: Will converting an image reduce its quality?
image-converter.faq2A: Converting to lossless formats like PNG preserves full quality. For lossy formats like JPG or WebP, you can adjust the quality setting to control the balance between file size and quality.
image-converter.faq3Q: Why should I convert images to WebP?
image-converter.faq3A: WebP provides superior compression compared to JPG and PNG, resulting in smaller file sizes with similar visual quality. It is widely supported by modern browsers and recommended for web use.

image-crop.title: Image Crop & Resize
image-crop.description: Crop and resize images with preset social media dimensions.
image-crop.metaTitle: Free Image Cropper & Resizer Online | ToolPic
image-crop.metaDescription: Crop and resize images online for free. Preset dimensions for social media. No upload needed.
image-crop.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to select the image you want to crop or resize.
image-crop.step2Desc: Drag the crop handles or choose a preset aspect ratio for social media platforms.
image-crop.step3Desc: Apply the crop and download your perfectly sized image.
image-crop.feature1Desc: One-click presets for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, YouTube thumbnails, and more.
image-crop.feature2Desc: Set any custom width and height or lock aspect ratios for precise cropping.
image-crop.feature3Desc: Intuitive drag-and-drop interface to select exactly the area you want to keep.
image-crop.feature4Desc: Crop and resize without recompressing. Original image quality is fully preserved.
image-crop.faq1Q: What social media dimensions are supported?
image-crop.faq1A: We include presets for Instagram posts (1080x1080), Instagram stories (1080x1920), Facebook covers (820x312), Twitter headers (1500x500), YouTube thumbnails (1280x720), and many more.
image-crop.faq2Q: Can I resize an image without cropping?
image-crop.faq2A: Yes. You can set custom width and height values to resize your image proportionally or to exact dimensions without cropping any part of it.
image-crop.faq3A: No. Cropping simply removes the parts of the image outside the selected area. The remaining portion retains its original quality.

image-watermark.title: Add Watermark
image-watermark.description: Add text or image watermarks to your photos in batch.
image-watermark.h1: Add Watermark to Images Online - Free
image-watermark.metaTitle: Free Image Watermark Tool - Add Text/Logo Watermark | ToolPic
image-watermark.metaDescription: Add text or image watermarks to photos online for free. Batch processing supported. 100% browser-based.
image-watermark.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select the photos you want to watermark.
image-watermark.step2Desc: Add text or upload a logo. Adjust position, size, opacity, and rotation.
image-watermark.step3Desc: Apply the watermark and download your protected images.
image-watermark.feature1Desc: Add custom text with font styling or upload your own logo as a watermark.
image-watermark.feature2Desc: Control position, size, opacity, rotation, and color of your watermark with precision.
image-watermark.feature3Desc: Apply the same watermark to multiple images at once. Perfect for photographers.
image-watermark.feature4Desc: Prevent unauthorized use of your photos by adding visible ownership marks.
image-watermark.faq1Q: Can I use my own logo as a watermark?
image-watermark.faq1A: Yes. You can upload any PNG or JPG image as a watermark. PNG images with transparent backgrounds work best for logo watermarks.
image-watermark.faq2Q: Can I watermark multiple images at once?
image-watermark.faq2A: Yes. Upload multiple images and the same watermark settings will be applied to all of them. You can download all watermarked images at once.
image-watermark.faq3Q: Will the watermark affect image quality?
image-watermark.faq3A: The watermark is applied as an overlay without recompressing the base image. Your original image quality is maintained.

image-bg-remove.title: Remove Background
image-bg-remove.description: AI-powered background removal. Get transparent PNG in seconds.
image-bg-remove.h1: Remove Image Background Online - Free AI Tool
image-bg-remove.metaTitle: Free Background Remover - AI Remove BG Online | ToolPic
image-bg-remove.metaDescription: Remove image background with AI online for free. Get transparent PNG in seconds. No upload, 100% private.
image-bg-remove.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select the image whose background you want to remove.
image-bg-remove.step2Desc: Our AI model automatically detects the subject and removes the background.
image-bg-remove.step3Desc: Download your image with a transparent background as a PNG file.
image-bg-remove.feature1Desc: Advanced machine learning model accurately separates foreground subjects from backgrounds.
image-bg-remove.feature2Desc: Get a transparent PNG in seconds. No manual editing or selection tools needed.
image-bg-remove.feature3Desc: People, products, animals, objects — the AI handles all types of subjects accurately.
image-bg-remove.feature4Desc: The AI model runs entirely in your browser using WebAssembly. Your images stay private.
image-bg-remove.faq1Q: How does the AI background removal work?
image-bg-remove.faq1A: We use a neural network model that runs directly in your browser. It analyzes the image to identify the main subject and creates a precise mask to remove the background.
image-bg-remove.faq2Q: What types of images work best?
image-bg-remove.faq2A: The AI works best with clear subjects that have good contrast with the background. Photos of people, products, and animals typically produce excellent results.
image-bg-remove.faq3Q: Is my image sent to a server for processing?
image-bg-remove.faq3A: No. The AI model is loaded into your browser and all processing happens locally on your device. Your images are never uploaded to any server.

image-merge.title: Merge Images
image-merge.description: Combine multiple images into one. Create collages and long images.
image-merge.h1: Merge Images Online - Free Collage Maker
image-merge.metaTitle: Free Image Merger - Combine Photos Online | ToolPic
image-merge.metaDescription: Merge and combine multiple images into one online for free. Create collages, long images. No upload needed.
image-merge.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select two or more images you want to combine.
image-merge.step2Desc: Choose horizontal, vertical, or grid layout. Adjust spacing and alignment.
image-merge.step3Desc: Export your combined image as a single file in your preferred format.
image-merge.feature1Desc: Merge images horizontally, vertically, or in a grid. Create long images or photo collages.
image-merge.feature2Desc: Add padding and gaps between images. Choose background color for the spacing area.
image-merge.feature3Desc: Easily rearrange image order by dragging and dropping thumbnails.
image-merge.feature4Desc: Combine as many images as you need. No restrictions on the number of photos.
image-merge.faq1Q: How many images can I merge at once?
image-merge.faq1A: There is no hard limit on the number of images. You can merge as many as your browser can handle. For best performance, we recommend merging up to 20 images at a time.
image-merge.faq2Q: Can I merge images of different sizes?
image-merge.faq2A: Yes. The tool automatically adjusts images to fit together. You can choose to match widths, heights, or keep original proportions.
image-merge.faq3Q: What output format is the merged image?
image-merge.faq3A: The merged image is saved as PNG by default to preserve quality. You can also choose JPG or WebP for smaller file sizes.

video-compress.title: Video Compressor
video-compress.description: Compress video files by adjusting resolution and bitrate.
video-compress.metaTitle: Free Video Compressor - Reduce Video Size Online | ToolPic
video-compress.metaDescription: Compress MP4, WebM, AVI videos online for free. Reduce file size without losing quality. Browser-based.
video-compress.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select an MP4, WebM, AVI, or MOV video file.
video-compress.step2Desc: Adjust resolution, bitrate, and quality settings to control the output file size.
video-compress.step3Desc: Wait for processing to complete, then download your smaller video file.
video-compress.feature1Desc: Reduce video file size by up to 70% while maintaining watchable quality.
video-compress.feature2Desc: Downscale video resolution from 4K to 1080p, 720p, or 480p for smaller files.
video-compress.feature3Desc: Videos are compressed locally using FFmpeg WebAssembly. No server uploads required.
video-compress.feature4Desc: Compress MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, and MKV video files.
video-compress.faq1Q: How long does video compression take?
video-compress.faq1A: Processing time depends on the video length, resolution, and your device's performance. A 1-minute 1080p video typically takes 30-60 seconds to compress.
video-compress.faq2Q: What is the maximum video file size?
video-compress.faq2A: Since processing happens in your browser, the limit depends on your device's available memory. Most devices can handle videos up to 500MB-1GB comfortably.
video-compress.faq3Q: Will compression make my video look bad?
video-compress.faq3A: With default settings, the visual quality difference is minimal. You can adjust the quality slider to find the perfect balance between file size and visual quality for your needs.

video-convert.title: Video Converter
video-convert.description: Convert videos between MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV formats.
video-convert.metaTitle: Free Video Converter - MP4 WebM AVI MOV Online | ToolPic
video-convert.metaDescription: Convert videos between MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, MKV formats online for free. Fast browser-based conversion.
video-convert.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select the video file you want to convert.
video-convert.step2Desc: Choose your target format: MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, or MKV.
video-convert.step3Desc: Wait for the conversion to finish, then download your video in the new format.
video-convert.feature1Desc: Convert between MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, and MKV formats for any device or platform.
video-convert.feature2Desc: Adjust video quality and codec settings to optimize for size or quality.
video-convert.feature3Desc: Convert videos directly in your browser without installing any software.
video-convert.feature4Desc: Your video files never leave your device. All conversion happens locally using WebAssembly.
video-convert.faq1Q: Which video format should I choose?
video-convert.faq1A: MP4 (H.264) is the most widely compatible format and works on virtually all devices and platforms. WebM is ideal for web use with smaller file sizes. MOV is preferred for Apple devices.
video-convert.faq2Q: Can I convert large video files?
video-convert.faq2A: Yes, but since conversion happens in your browser, performance depends on your device. Most devices handle files up to 500MB-1GB smoothly. For larger files, a desktop browser is recommended.
video-convert.faq3Q: Does the conversion affect video quality?
video-convert.faq3A: You can choose the output quality during conversion. With high quality settings, the difference from the original is negligible. Lower quality settings produce smaller files.

video-to-gif.title: Video to GIF
video-to-gif.description: Convert video clips to animated GIF with custom settings.
video-to-gif.h1: Convert Video to GIF Online - Free
video-to-gif.metaTitle: Free Video to GIF Converter Online | ToolPic
video-to-gif.metaDescription: Convert video to GIF online for free. Customize frame rate, size, and duration. No software needed.
video-to-gif.howToUseTitle: How to Convert Video to GIF
video-to-gif.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select an MP4, WebM, or other video file.
video-to-gif.step2Desc: Set the start time, duration, frame rate, and output size for your GIF.
video-to-gif.step3Desc: Generate and download your animated GIF file.
video-to-gif.feature1Desc: Choose the exact start point and duration of the video segment to convert into a GIF.
video-to-gif.feature2Desc: Adjust FPS to balance between smooth animation and smaller file size.
video-to-gif.feature3Desc: Set custom width for your GIF. Smaller dimensions produce much smaller file sizes.
video-to-gif.feature4Desc: See a preview of your GIF before downloading to make sure it looks exactly right.
video-to-gif.faq1Q: How can I make my GIF file smaller?
video-to-gif.faq1A: Reduce the output width, lower the frame rate (10-12 FPS is usually sufficient), and keep the duration short. These three factors have the biggest impact on GIF file size.
video-to-gif.faq2Q: What frame rate should I use?
video-to-gif.faq2A: For most GIFs, 10-15 FPS provides smooth animation with reasonable file sizes. Higher frame rates create smoother motion but significantly larger files.
video-to-gif.faq3Q: Is there a time limit for the video?
video-to-gif.faq3A: There is no strict time limit, but GIFs are best suited for short clips (under 10 seconds). Longer GIFs result in very large file sizes that may be impractical to share.

video-extract-audio.title: Extract Audio
video-extract-audio.description: Extract audio tracks from video files as MP3, WAV, or AAC.
video-extract-audio.h1: Extract Audio from Video Online - Free
video-extract-audio.metaTitle: Free Audio Extractor - Get MP3 from Video | ToolPic
video-extract-audio.metaDescription: Extract audio from video online for free. Save as MP3, WAV, or AAC. Fast browser-based extraction.
video-extract-audio.howToUseTitle: How to Extract Audio from Video
video-extract-audio.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select the video file containing the audio you want to extract.
video-extract-audio.step2Desc: Select your preferred output format: MP3, WAV, or AAC.
video-extract-audio.step3Desc: Wait for extraction to complete, then download the audio file.
video-extract-audio.feature1Desc: Export audio as MP3 for universal compatibility, WAV for lossless quality, or AAC for efficient compression.
video-extract-audio.feature2Desc: Audio extraction is faster than full video conversion since only the audio stream is processed.
video-extract-audio.feature3Desc: Extract audio from MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, MKV, and other common video formats.
video-extract-audio.feature4Desc: Extract the original audio track without re-encoding for the best possible quality.
video-extract-audio.faq1Q: Which audio format should I choose?
video-extract-audio.faq1A: MP3 is the most widely compatible format and works everywhere. WAV provides uncompressed lossless quality but creates larger files. AAC offers better quality than MP3 at similar file sizes.
video-extract-audio.faq2Q: Can I extract audio from a YouTube video?
video-extract-audio.faq2A: This tool works with video files on your device. You would need to first download the video file, then upload it here to extract the audio track.
video-extract-audio.faq3Q: Will the audio quality be the same as the original?
video-extract-audio.faq3A: When extracting to a lossless format like WAV, the audio quality matches the original. When extracting to MP3 or AAC, slight compression is applied but quality remains excellent at high bitrate settings.
